title: abies alba var. virescens
intro: Abies alba var. virescens, also known as the green-needled silver fir, is a variety of fir tree native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been found to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Abies alba var. virescens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. The plant can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or infusion, and is often used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory issues.
